title: heterotheca oligantha
intro: Heterotheca oligantha, also known as slender hairy false goldeneye, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of heterotheca oligantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Heterotheca oligantha can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
